name: AMKOR TECHNOLOGY, INC.
summary: PARTI OVERVIEW Amkor is the worlds largest U.S. headquartered outsourced semiconductor assembly and test service provider (OSAT) and is a global leader in outsourced semiconductor packaging and test services. With a strong track record of innovation, a broad and diverse geographic footprint and solid partnerships with lead customers, Amkor delivers high-quality solutions that enable the worlds leading semiconductor and electronics companies to bring advanced technologies to market.
